category_sources: Official homepage describes SIS-PM Control for Linux as managing USB controlled powerstrips.
source_facts.description says it controls Gembird SIS-PM programmable power outlet strips.
display_name_sources: Official homepage refers to the utility as sispmctl.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes installation instructions, usage, and an excerpt from the sispmctl man page.
source_facts.homepage is the official project page.
repo_sources: Official homepage gives git clone https://git.code.sf.net/p/sispmctl/git sispmctl for the current code.
tags_sources: Official homepage says it manages USB controlled powerstrips from Gembird/Energenie.
source_facts.description identifies control of programmable power outlet strips.
